modal.videoDesc: Monitor video trends on YouTube and public posts on Facebook.
modal.ecommerceDesc: Monitor product reviews on Tokopedia & Shopee, Kaskus discussions, and podcasts on Spotify & YT Music.

toasts.statusUpdateFailed: Source status could not be updated.
toasts.statusUpdateRetry: Could not update the source status. Please try again.
toasts.syncAllNoneActive: No active sources available to sync.
toasts.syncAllAllFailed: All {failed} sources failed to sync. See console for details.
toasts.syncAllError: Sync could not be started. Please try again.
toasts.bootstrapFailed: Default sources could not be added. Please try again.
toasts.deleteFailed: Could not delete the data source.
toasts.liveApiRefreshing: Refreshing signal data from the API...
toasts.activityLogMissing: Full sync logs are not available yet.

activity.emptyDesc: Sync logs will appear here once a source finishes an ingestion run.

toasts.settingsUnavailable: The "{title}" settings are not configurable yet. Contact the platform team for this module.

delete.title: Delete Data Source
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the data source {name}? This will stop syncing and remove the source from your monitoring list.

Sources.noSourcesYetDesc: Connect data sources to start monitoring.
Sources.noCategoryMatchDesc: Try selecting another category or add a new source.
Sources.noLiveSourcesDesc: Backend connected successfully, but no sources have been created yet.
Sources.liveUnavailable: Live sources could not be loaded
Sources.liveUnavailableDesc: API client attempted token refresh. Showing sample data for now.

empty.title: No data available yet
empty.desc: Once data is available, it will appear here with the same layout and controls.

error.title: Unable to load data
error.desc: The request failed. Try again, or check the backend connection if this keeps happening.

loading.title: Loading dashboard data
loading.desc: Preparing the latest signals, alerts, and recommendations.

ActivityLog.title: Activity Log
ActivityLog.subtitle: Workspace Audit Trail
ActivityLog.desc: Monitor important workspace changes: authentication, members, data sources, cases, integrations, and settings.
ActivityLog.errorDesc: Audit logs could not be retrieved from the backend. Try refreshing or check API connection.
ActivityLog.emptyDesc: Audit events will appear here once there are workspace changes or user activities.
